title: 32px Favicon Grid
prompt: Create one square logo exploration tile for Agentic Craft: a black-and-white 8-bit pixel-art app icon based on a simple scratch of a circular pale field with a thick dark rim and narrow rectangular black sunglasses. Favicon-first, 32x32 pixel grid feel, hard square pixels, no antialiasing look, no text. Keep it original: anonymous secret-agent sunglasses as a motif, not a movie character likeness, no Matrix branding, no green code rain, no actor face. White inspection background, centered icon, high contrast, readable at 16px.

title: Ink Stamp Rim
prompt: Create one square logo exploration tile for Agentic Craft: black-and-white pixel-art circular icon with an ink-stamp-like dark rim made from stepped one-bit pixels, pale inner disc, and narrow rectangular sunglasses connected by a simple bridge. Preserve the user's sketch silhouette: circle, rim, glasses, anonymous face field. No text, no gradients, no color, no Matrix branding, no green code rain, no actor or character likeness. It should feel like Agentic Craft's achromatic proof-sheet identity translated into an 8-bit favicon.

title: Flat Agent Shades
